summary: Phase 3 backend + frontend fully validated. 10/10 pytest cases passed against /api/projects/analyze, /api/projects, /api/projects/{id} with real Gemini 3 Flash calls. Frontend end-to-end flow (script -> generate -> /analysis) passed including localStorage persistence, reload survival, empty state, and zero console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: `logger` is referenced inside route handlers (lines 152/155/158/165) but only assigned at module bottom (line 205). It works because Python resolves the name at call time, but it is fragile. Move the logging.basicConfig + logger = getLogger(__name__) block to the top of the module (right after imports) for clarity.

Spec note: the requirement 'Clicking generate-broll-plan-button without script content shows a toast \'Paste a script first.\' and does NOT navigate' is only half-honoured. The button is `disabled` when script is empty, so the click is blocked at the DOM level and the toast.error() in handleGenerate never fires. Navigation prevention works (the user CANNOT navigate), but the toast feedback is silent. Either (a) update the spec to acknowledge the disabled state, or (b) drop the `disabled` prop and rely on the guard so the toast fires. Marked informational, not a bug.
llm_service.py is solid — defensive JSON extraction with fence stripping, scene renumbering, duration clamping, and projectTitle auto-derivation all behave correctly.
MongoDB _id correctly excluded from all GET responses via projection {"_id": 0}.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 TEST_ project record via /api/projects/analyze; persisted in db.projects. Safe to leave (filtered by brandName='TEST_Studio').
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_projects_analyze.py is the regression suite — it caches one analyze() call across tests to keep LLM cost down (~15s total). Frontend storage key is 'broll.studio.v3' — clear it in setup. Sample-script inline button data-testid='script-sample-button-inline' works. Generation round-trip is ~10-15s; use 80s timeout on wait_for_url('**/analysis').
verified_flows: POST /api/projects/analyze 200 with full ProjectRecord shape, 3-6 scenes, each scene with 2-4 keywords + 2-3 broll suggestions
Keyword reason categories cover >=3 of the spec set (observed: emotional, business, statistic, problem, solution, urgency, transformation, etc.)
GET /api/projects returns most-recent-first list including the freshly created id
GET /api/projects/{id} returns the same record (no _id leak)
MongoDB persistence verified (analyze then list contains new id)
UI: generate-broll-plan-button visible; disabled when script empty (does not navigate)
UI: clicking generate -> button label becomes 'Generating B-roll Plan...', textarea disabled, navigates to /analysis within ~15s with success toast

UI /analysis: page-title equals plan.projectTitle, scenes-list renders scene-row-{n} with scene-headline-{n}, headlines-list count matches, keywords-list count matches, broll-grid count matches, priority badges + assetType + S## marker present
UI: localStorage 'broll.studio.v3' has plan + projectId after generation; reload preserves both and /analysis still renders without backend re-call
UI: clearing localStorage then visiting /analysis shows analysis-empty-state with 'Go to Script' CTA
